mainEntity.name: Hawaii hotel cleaning chemicals made me dizzy and nauseous—what are my legal rights?

acceptedAnswer.text: You are entitled to medical coverage and wage replacement. Because cleaning chemicals often cause invisible respiratory or neurological injuries, documenting the specific products and reporting symptoms immediately is vital to proving your case.
